title: IIIF Presentation 2.1 Manifest (minimal)
description: A minimal, growable schema for an IIIF Presentation API 2.1 Manifest. ponytail: validates the Manifest and two levels down (Sequence, Canvas); does NOT descend into AnnotationList/Annotation/resource, nor check metadata/thumbnail/attribution. Add those levels when a real manifest needs them. Also accepts the legacy Shared Canvas context, since real-world institutions (e.g. the Smithsonian) still publish it and it is structurally identical to Presentation 2.

@context.description: Must be the IIIF Presentation 2 context URI or the legacy Shared Canvas context URI, or an array of strings containing one of them.

@id.description: The URI that identifies this Manifest.

label.description: A human-readable label. Presentation 2 allows a plain string, or an array of strings/language-tagged value objects; unlike Presentation 3 there is no formal language-map requirement, so this is intentionally loose.

sequences.description: The list of Sequences. Technically optional per spec, but required here since a manifest without one has no canvases to check.

sequence.description: A Sequence: needs @type and at least one Canvas. @id is spec-optional ('a sequence may have an id') so it is not required here.

canvas.description: A Canvas: needs @id, @type, label, height, and width - the spec requires height and width to be present.
